slots.name: eyebrow
slots.notes: Small label above the main heading. E.g., 'Selected Work'

slots.name: sectionTitle
slots.notes: Main heading of the showcase section

slots.name: projects
slots.notes: List of projects: { id, title, category, description, client, year, image, link }

layout_variants.name: Minimalist Outlined List (2D Swiss)
layout_variants.description: Swiss-style minimalist list-rows of projects. Projects are divided by thin 1px lines. When hovering over a project row, a preview thumbnail appears and smoothly follows the cursor (floating image preview) using gsap.quickTo. Project titles reveal via SplitTextReveal on scroll.

visual_specs.typography: Large project titles in Inter or Mono fonts (text-3xl font-medium tracking-tight), small project number indexes (text-xs Mono), and muted lowercase categories.
visual_specs.spacing: Rows have vertical padding py-8 px-4. Gridlines are thin 1px borders. Floating thumbnail preview size is fixed at w-[300px] h-[200px] and hidden by default.
visual_specs.colors: Clean light or minimalist dark backgrounds. Divider lines are thin 1px oklch(0.85 0.005 240). High contrast text oklch(0.12 0.005 240).
visual_specs.layout: 1D vertical list layout occupying 100% width, without using card grids.

code_blueprint.gsap_timeline: SplitTextReveal slides words up on scroll: gsap.fromTo('.project-title-word', { yPercent: 100, opacity: 0 }, { yPercent: 0, opacity: 1, stagger: 0.02, scrollTrigger: { trigger: '.project-row', start: 'top 90%', once: true } }).
code_blueprint.scroll_trigger: N/A (Uses row-level trigger or mouse movements).
code_blueprint.interactive_hover: Floating Thumbnail: Hovering over the row runs gsap.to(thumbnail, { autoAlpha: 1, scale: 1, duration: 0.3 }). A mousemove listener tracks coordinates and applies them: const xTo = gsap.quickTo(thumbnail, 'x', { duration: 0.4, ease: 'power3.out' }); xTo(mouse.x); const yTo = gsap.quickTo(thumbnail, 'y', { duration: 0.4, ease: 'power3.out' }); yTo(mouse.y).
code_blueprint.css_classes: .project-row { border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-color); position: relative; } .floating-preview { position: fixed; pointer-events: none; transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(0.8); opacity: 0; z-index: 50; }

anti_patterns: Forbidden card grid repetitions, forbidden box-shadows on list rows.
Forbidden rounded corners on list rows. Boundaries must be sharp, straight, and flat.
Forbidden static thumbnail reveals; preview must smoothly follow the mouse cursor.

layout_variants.name: Sticky Stacking Cards (Deck of Cards)
layout_variants.description: Card stacking layout on scroll. Project cards are pinned at the top of the viewport (sticky top-12svh) and stack over each other as the user scrolls down, creating 3D depth by scaling previous cards down and applying alternating rotation angles.

visual_specs.typography: Medium bold sans-serif card titles (text-4xl font-bold), small tag badges.
visual_specs.spacing: Card padding py-8 px-10. Moderate spacing between cards.
visual_specs.colors: Each card uses a slightly different oklch background color or alternating light/dark shades to differentiate layers. Apply a dark overlay automatically (opacity: 0 -> 0.4) on underlying cards.
visual_specs.layout: Vertical scroll container with height proportional to card count (e.g. 3 cards = 300vh), child cards set to sticky position.

code_blueprint.scroll_trigger: GSAP ScrollTrigger pins the deck and scales down previous cards: gsap.to(prevCard, { scale: 0.95, opacity: 0.6, scrollTrigger: { trigger: currentCard, start: 'top 12svh', end: 'bottom 12svh', scrub: true } }). Cards receive alternating rotation styles (-2deg, 3deg, -1deg, 4deg).
code_blueprint.interactive_hover: Hovering on a card lifts it slightly (yPercent: -2, duration: 0.3, ease: 'power2.out').
code_blueprint.css_classes: .showcase-card { position: sticky; top: 12svh; transform-origin: top center; }

anti_patterns: Forbidden corner radiuses larger than 16px on card panels.
Forbidden harsh box-shadows combined with coarse borders.
Forbidden completely hiding underlying cards without applying scale shrinkage.

text_split_reveal.intent: Main title and eyebrow slide up staggered from below.

stacking_cards_scrub.intent: Cards stack on top of each other during vertical scroll.

floating_preview_follow.intent: Floating thumbnail image tracks the cursor when hovering over the project rows.

subtle_bg_glow.intent: Soft background gradient pulses slowly underneath to highlight projects.

in.description: Background darkens or lightens smoothly to blend with the preceding section.

out.description: Fade background color smoothly into the next section's background.

flow.notes: The primary section for showcasing products visually; should be placed after feature explanations.
